推荐场景: 酒店早餐区入口｜确认早餐时间
60秒任务: 「早餐时间」：入住/房间/服务时间确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 入住｜房间信息｜服务时间｜小问题｜礼貌请求
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜旅行服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
What time is breakfast?（早餐时间）
Breakfast is from ___ to ___.（时间范围）
Where is the breakfast room?（地点）
Is breakfast included?（是否包含）
Can I take coffee to my room?（带回房间）
I would like tea, please.（饮品请求）
Do you have fruit?（询问食物）
I can’t eat ___.（简单忌口）
Can I have more water?（加水）
The breakfast room is downstairs.（位置）
Please show your room number.（核对房号）
I am too late for breakfast.（错过早餐）
Is there food after breakfast?（替代询问）
Let’s go before it closes.（行动决定）
Thank you, that’s enough.（结束）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: breakfast, coffee, tea, fruit, bread, egg, water, room, table, buffet
Verbs: eat, drink, take, show, close, open, serve, ask
Adjectives: included, late, early, hot, cold, enough
Time / Place: morning, from seven to ten, downstairs, upstairs, in the room
Chunks: breakfast room, room number, more water, before it closes, after breakfast
